interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are associated with rivers?
interactions.intention: Which mountains are associated with rivers?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.NAME FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_RIVER ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAINS = MONDIAL_RIVER.MOUNTAINS WHERE MONDIAL_RIVER.MOUNTAINS IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of these mountains?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the mountains associated with rivers?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.NAME, MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN JOIN MONDIAL_RIVER ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAINS = MONDIAL_RIVER.MOUNTAINS WHERE MONDIAL_RIVER.MOUNTAINS IS NOT NULL

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the lengths of those rivers?
interactions.intention: What are the lengths of the rivers associated with these mountains?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_RIVER.NAME, MONDIAL_RIVER.LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN ON MONDIAL_RIVER.MOUNTAINS = MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN.MOUNTAINS WHERE MONDIAL_RIVER.MOUNTAINS IS NOT NULL

interactions.intention: Which airports are located in the city of Praha?

interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of this airport?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the airport retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE CITY = 'Praha'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which country is this airport located in?
interactions.intention: Which country is the airport retrieved in the previous interaction located in?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE CITY = 'Praha'

interactions.utterance: What is the population of Pforzheim in 1987?
interactions.intention: What is the population of Pforzheim in 1987?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE CITY = 'Pforzheim' AND YEAR = 1987

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which province and country does this city belong to?
interactions.intention: Which province and country does the city retrieved in the previous interaction belong to?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE CITY = 'Pforzheim'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of this province?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the province retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AREA FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE NAME = 'Baden-Württemberg'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which continents have an area greater than 10 million square kilometers?
interactions.intention: Which continents have an area greater than 10 million square kilometers?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT WHERE AREA > 10000000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries are located entirely in these continents?
interactions.intention: Which countries are located entirely in the continents retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES WHERE CONTINENT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT WHERE AREA > 10000000) AND PERCENTAGE = 100

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of those countries?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of the countries retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE COUNTRY IN (SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES WHERE CONTINENT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT WHERE AREA > 10000000) AND PERCENTAGE = 100)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which deserts have an area larger than 100,000 square kilometers?
interactions.intention: Which deserts have an area larger than 100,000 square kilometers?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE AREA > 100000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: In which countries can I find these deserts?
interactions.intention: In which countries can I find the deserts retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE DESERT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE AREA > 100000)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the ethnic groups present in those countries?
interactions.intention: What are the ethnic groups present in the countries retrieved in the previous interaction?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT NAME FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP WHERE COUNTRY IN (SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE DESERT IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_DESERT WHERE AREA > 100000))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow through the province of Sachsen-Anhalt?
interactions.intention: Which rivers flow through the province of Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the countries these rivers belong to?
interactions.intention: What are the countries of the rivers flowing through Sachsen-Anhalt?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the sources of these rivers?
interactions.intention: What are the sources of the rivers flowing through Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE INNER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY ON MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt';

interactions.intention: What are the names of lakes located in the Xinjiang province?

interactions.intention: What is the area of the lakes located in the Xinjiang province?

interactions.intention: Are there any islands in the lakes located in the Xinjiang province?

interactions.intention: What is the area of the island of Agung?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of this island?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the island of Agung?

interactions.intention: Which countries have provinces bordering the seas with a depth greater than 5000 meters?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA JOIN MONDIAL_SEA ON MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = MONDIAL_SEA.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_SEA.DEPTH > 5000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what are the provinces in those countries?
interactions.intention: What are the provinces in the countries bordering the seas with a depth greater than 5000 meters?

interactions.intention: What type of government do the countries retrieved in the previous interaction have?

interactions.intention: Which seas are connected to the Andaman Sea?

interactions.intention: What are the depths of the seas connected to the Andaman Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_SEA.NAME, MONDIAL_SEA.DEPTH FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH JOIN MONDIAL_SEA ON MONDIAL_MERGESWITH.SEA2 = MONDIAL_SEA.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_MERGESWITH.SEA1 = 'Andaman Sea'

interactions.intention: What was the population of the countries fully located in Europe in 2012?

interactions.intention: What are the provinces within those countries where the deserts are located?

interactions.intention: Which airports are located in the Czech Republic?

interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the airport in Pardubice?

interactions.utterance: Is Pardubice the capital of its country?
interactions.intention: Is Pardubice the capital of its country?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN C.NAME = CO.CAPITAL THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS IS_CAPITAL FROM MONDIAL_CITY C JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY CO ON C.COUNTRY = CO.CODE WHERE C.NAME = 'Pardubice'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries share a border with Albania?
interactions.intention: Which countries share a border with Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the population of these countries in 2012?
interactions.intention: What was the population of the countries that share a border with Albania in 2012?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MB.COUNTRY2, MCP.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS MCP ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MCP.COUNTRY WHERE MB.COUNTRY1 = 'AL' AND MCP.YEAR = 2012

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is the GDP of these countries?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of the countries that share a border with Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MB.COUNTRY2, ME.GDP FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME ON MB.COUNTRY2 = ME.COUNTRY WHERE MB.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities in Denmark have a population recorded for the year 1987?
interactions.intention: Which cities in Denmark have a population recorded for the year 1987?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.CITY FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME AND MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_PROVINCE.COUNTRY = 'DK' AND MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.YEAR = 1987

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the population of these cities in 1987?
interactions.intention: What was the population of the cities in Denmark recorded for the year 1987?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.CITY, MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS JOIN MONDIAL_PROVINCE ON MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.NAME AND MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_PROVINCE.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_PROVINCE.COUNTRY = 'DK' AND MONDIAL_CITYPOPS.YEAR = 1987

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is the total population of Denmark?
interactions.intention: What is the total population of Denmark?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.POPULATION) AS TOTAL_POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS WHERE MONDIAL_COUNTRYPOPS.COUNTRY = 'DK'

interactions.intention: Which deserts have an area greater than 100,000 square kilometers?

interactions.utterance: Which countries border Albania?
interactions.intention: Which countries share a border with Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON (MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY2 = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE) WHERE MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are their populations?
interactions.intention: What are the populations of the countries that border Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME, MONDIAL_COUNTRY.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON (MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY2 = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE) WHERE MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And their areas?
interactions.intention: What are the areas of the countries that border Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_COUNTRY.NAME, MONDIAL_COUNTRY.AREA FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY ON (MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY2 = MONDIAL_COUNTRY.CODE) WHERE MONDIAL_BORDERS.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located in India?
interactions.intention: Which mountains are located in India?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_GEO_MOUNTAIN WHERE COUNTRY = 'IND'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the elevation of Anamudi?
interactions.intention: What is the elevation of Anamudi?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAIN WHERE NAME = 'Anamudi'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Is Anamudi located on any island?
interactions.intention: Is Anamudi located on any island?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND WHERE MOUNTAIN = 'Anamudi'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries have a high unemployment rate?
interactions.intention: Which countries have a high unemployment rate?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE UNEMPLOYMENT > 20

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the primary languages spoken in those countries?
interactions.intention: What are the primary languages spoken in the countries with high unemployment rates?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ML.NAME FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ML JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME ON ML.COUNTRY = ME.COUNTRY WHERE ME.UNEMPLOYMENT > 20

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population growth rate in those countries?
interactions.intention: What is the population growth rate in the countries with high unemployment rates?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP.POPULATION_GROWTH FROM MONDIAL_POPULATION MP JOIN MONDIAL_ECONOMY ME ON MP.COUNTRY = ME.COUNTRY WHERE ME.UNEMPLOYMENT > 20

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries share a border with Albania?
interactions.intention: Which countries share a border with Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are these countries members of any organizations?
interactions.intention: Are the countries that share a border with Albania members of any organizations?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT M2.ORGANIZATION FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS M1 JOIN MONDIAL_ISMEMBER M2 ON M1.COUNTRY2 = M2.COUNTRY WHERE M1.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the full names of these organizations?
interactions.intention: What are the full names of the organizations that these countries are members of?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT M3.NAME FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS M1 JOIN MONDIAL_ISMEMBER M2 ON M1.COUNTRY2 = M2.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION M3 ON M2.ORGANIZATION = M3.ABBREVIATION WHERE M1.COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list all the cities in the province of Moskovskaya?
interactions.intention: Can you list all the cities in the province of Moskovskaya?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of each city you just mentioned?
interactions.intention: What is the population of each city in the province of Moskovskaya?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Do these cities have any alternate names?
interactions.intention: Do the cities in the province of Moskovskaya have any alternate names?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_CITY.NAME, MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME ON MONDIAL_CITY.NAME = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_CITYOTHERNAME.PROVINCE WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = 'Moskovskaya'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which islands are located in the Mediterranean Sea?
interactions.intention: Which islands are located in the Mediterranean Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_ISLANDIN WHERE SEA = 'Mediterranean Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of this sea?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the Mediterranean Sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AREA FROM MONDIAL_SEA WHERE NAME = 'Mediterranean Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Does this sea merge with any other sea?
interactions.intention: Does the Mediterranean Sea merge with any other sea?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SEA2 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH WHERE SEA1 = 'Mediterranean Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which provinces in RIM have deserts?
interactions.intention: Which provinces in RIM have deserts?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE COUNTRY = 'RIM'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the alternative names for these provinces?
interactions.intention: What are the alternative names for the provinces mentioned earlier?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT OTHERNAME FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCEOTHERNAME WHERE COUNTRY = 'RIM' AND PROVINCE IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE COUNTRY = 'RIM')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the population of these provinces in the most recent year?
interactions.intention: What is the population of the provinces mentioned earlier in the most recent year?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVPOPS WHERE COUNTRY = 'RIM' AND PROVINCE IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE COUNTRY = 'RIM') AND YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM MONDIAL_PROVPOPS WHERE COUNTRY = 'RIM' AND PROVINCE IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_DESERT WHERE COUNTRY = 'RIM'))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which airports are located in the Czech Republic?
interactions.intention: Which airports are located in the Czech Republic?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_AIRPORT WHERE COUNTRY = 'CZ'

interactions.intention: What is the elevation of the airports located in the Czech Republic?

interactions.intention: What are the cities where the airports in the Czech Republic are located?

interactions.intention: What is the GDP of Albania?

interactions.utterance: What is the unemployment rate in Albania?
interactions.intention: What is the unemployment rate in Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT UNEMPLOYMENT FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE COUNTRY = 'AL';

interactions.intention: Which ethnic groups are present in Albania?

interactions.intention: What is the population of Ulm in 1987?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the area of the province where Ulm is located?
interactions.intention: What is the area of the province where Ulm is located?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the capital of this province?
interactions.intention: What is the capital of the province where Ulm is located?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CAPITAL FROM MONDIAL_PROVINCE WHERE NAME = (SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITYPOPS WHERE CITY = 'Ulm')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flow through the province of Sachsen-Anhalt?
interactions.intention: Which rivers flow through the province of Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the countries these rivers belong to?
interactions.intention: What are the countries the rivers flowing through Sachsen-Anhalt belong to?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the estuary elevations for these rivers?
interactions.intention: What are the estuary elevations for the rivers flowing through Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MGE.RIVER, MR.ESTUARYELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY MGE JOIN MONDIAL_RIVER MR ON MGE.RIVER = MR.NAME WHERE MGE.PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt';

interactions.intention: Which lakes are located in the Xinjiang province?

interactions.intention: What is the area of the lakes located in the Xinjiang province?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which languages are spoken in the countries of these lakes?
interactions.intention: Which languages are spoken in the countries of the lakes located in the Xinjiang province?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT ML.NAME FROM MONDIAL_LANGUAGE ML JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_LAKE MGL ON ML.COUNTRY = MGL.COUNTRY WHERE MGL.PROVINCE = 'Xinjiang'

interactions.intention: Which organizations are located in Genève?

interactions.utterance: Which country is it associated with?
interactions.intention: Which country is the organization <retrieved in the previous interaction> associated with?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries border Albania?
interactions.intention: Which countries border Albania?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What percentage of Europe do these countries cover?
interactions.intention: What percentage of Europe do the countries bordering Albania cover?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES WHERE CONTINENT = 'Europe' AND COUNTRY IN (SELECT COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list a province from each of these countries?
interactions.intention: Can you list a province from each country bordering Albania?

interactions.utterance: Which organizations were established in Geneva?
interactions.intention: Which organizations were established in Geneva?

interactions.intention: What is the abbreviation of the organizations established in Geneva?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And in which year were they established?
interactions.intention: In which year were the organizations established in Geneva founded?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ESTABLISHED FROM MONDIAL_ORGANIZATION WHERE CITY = 'Genève'

interactions.utterance: What airports are located in the Czech Republic?
interactions.intention: What airports are located in the Czech Republic?

interactions.utterance: Which provinces are these airports located in?
interactions.intention: Which provinces are the airports in the Czech Republic located in?

interactions.intention: Are any airports in the Czech Republic located on an island?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the length of the river Clyde?
interactions.intention: What is the length of the river Clyde?

interactions.utterance: Which sea does it flow into?
interactions.intention: Which sea does the river Clyde flow into?

interactions.utterance: What is its source elevation?
interactions.intention: What is the source elevation of the river Clyde?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which cities have a population greater than 200,000?
interactions.intention: Which cities have a population greater than 200,000?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE POPULATION > 200000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the provinces of these cities?
interactions.intention: What are the provinces of the cities with a population greater than 200,000?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_CITY WHERE POPULATION > 200000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what rivers are they located on?
interactions.intention: What rivers are the cities with a population greater than 200,000 located on?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_LOCATED.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_CITY JOIN MONDIAL_LOCATED ON MONDIAL_CITY.NAME = MONDIAL_LOCATED.CITY AND MONDIAL_CITY.PROVINCE = MONDIAL_LOCATED.PROVINCE AND MONDIAL_CITY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_LOCATED.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_CITY.POPULATION > 200000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which countries have a parliamentary democracy?
interactions.intention: Which countries have a parliamentary democracy?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_POLITICS WHERE GOVERNMENT = 'parliamentary democracy'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the major ethnic groups in those countries?
interactions.intention: What are the major ethnic groups in the countries with a parliamentary democracy?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ME.NAME, ME.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP ME JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP ON ME.COUNTRY = MP.COUNTRY WHERE MP.GOVERNMENT = 'parliamentary democracy'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is the population in the provinces of those countries?
interactions.intention: What is the population in the provinces of the countries with a parliamentary democracy?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP.PROVINCE, MP.POPULATION FROM MONDIAL_PROVPOPS MP JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MPOL ON MP.COUNTRY = MPOL.COUNTRY WHERE MPOL.GOVERNMENT = 'parliamentary democracy'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers have their estuaries in Sachsen-Anhalt?
interactions.intention: Which rivers have their estuaries in Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the countries of these rivers?
interactions.intention: What are the countries of the rivers with estuaries in Sachsen-Anhalt?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY WHERE PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Where do these rivers originate?
interactions.intention: Where do the rivers with estuaries in Sachsen-Anhalt originate?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER, MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY ON MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE.RIVER = MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.RIVER WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY.PROVINCE = 'Sachsen-Anhalt'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the islands located in Scotland?
interactions.intention: What are the islands located in Scotland?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND WHERE PROVINCE = 'Scotland'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which ethnic groups are present in the countries of these islands?
interactions.intention: Which ethnic groups are present in the countries of the islands located in Scotland?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.NAME FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.PROVINCE = 'Scotland'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And what is the percentage of these ethnic groups?
interactions.intention: What is the percentage of the ethnic groups present in the countries of the islands located in Scotland?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.NAME, MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND ON MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_ISLAND.PROVINCE = 'Scotland'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the GDP of European countries?
interactions.intention: What is the GDP of European countries?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY, MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which country has the highest GDP?
interactions.intention: Which country has the highest GDP among the European countries?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY, MAX(MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP) AS MAX_GDP FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe' GROUP BY MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY ORDER BY MAX_GDP DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the unemployment rate in that country?
interactions.intention: What is the unemployment rate in the country with the highest GDP among European countries?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_ECONOMY.UNEMPLOYMENT FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe' AND MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP = (SELECT MAX(MONDIAL_ECONOMY.GDP) FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_ECONOMY.COUNTRY = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY WHERE MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT = 'Europe')
